title: oberonia pumilio
intro: Oberonia pumilio, also known as the dwarf orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, particularly its roots are valued for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oberonia pumilio are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Oberonia pumilio typically involve drying and processing its roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or powders for medicinal use.
